title: festuca pseudomyuros var. sciuroides
intro: Festuca pseudomyuros var. sciuroides, also known as sheep's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Festuca pseudomyuros var. sciuroides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
